data.title: Ryan Ross appointed CEO of Total Wine & More, largest US independent retailer of alcohol. 25+ years experience.
data.description: A prominent independent retailer of fine wine, spirits, and beer in America, Total Wine & More revealed that Ryan Ross will become the company's Chief Executive Officer starting January 12, 2026. With over 25 years of experience in the industry, Ross will be taking on this new role at the Bethesda, Md.-based company.

data.title: El Salvador's President offers to release all prisoners to verify claims by Clinton on prison conditions.
data.description: El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele responded to Hillary Clinton's criticism of the nation's prison conditions and alleged torture. He proposed a solution by offering to release all prisoners to any country willing to accept them, including gang leaders, to verify the claims. Bukele stated that this would make it easier for journalists and NGOs to access former inmates for interviews. Until this occurs, Bukele emphasized his government's focus on prioritizing the human rights of Salvadoran citizens, ensuring they live free from gang influence. This development was shared in a recent post by Bukele. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: New ETFs by Amplify now live, track firms in stablecoins & tokenization. Features companies blending stocks & crypto. #Finance #Investing
data.description: Amplify has launched two new ETFs focusing on companies involved in building the infrastructure for stablecoins and tokenization, creating a unique blend of traditional stocks and cryptocurrency assets. These ETFs aim to provide investors with exposure to this growing sector, which is experiencing significant interest and growth. Investors can now access this innovative market through these new ETFs offered by Amplify.

data.title: Upexi's Solana treasury dips 7.5% post $1B shelf registration, hinting at potential increase in holdings after 5-month hiatus.
data.description: The stock of Upexi dropped by 7.5% on Tuesday following the submission of a $1 billion shelf registration. This move indicates that the company may increase its Solana holdings once more, following a period of more than five months without any new acquisitions.

data.title: Financial Star News Inc. addresses confusion from BaFin warning, clarifying unaffiliated third-party impersonation.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 23, 2025, Financial Star News Inc., owner of the website www.thefinancialstar.com, released a statement addressing public confusion caused by a warning from BaFin, Germany's financial regulator. The statement aims to clarify any misunderstandings surrounding the issue.
